title: Effect of a Fatigue Protocol in the Study of Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injuries
author: Ortiz-Sánchez, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This dataset contains the anonymized data generated for the study “Effect of a Fatigue Protocol in the Study of Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injuries” . It includes measurements collected from participants who completed a standardized fatigue protocol designed to examine its influence on biomechanical, neuromuscular, and functional variables associated with ACL injury risk.
